goal: Extend window layout presets in App.tsx so they also save and restore the main window bounds, not only panel splits and popout bounds.
constraints: Modify only src/renderer/src/App.tsx unless a tiny adjacent type adjustment is strictly required.
Use the existing preload APIs for getMainWindowBounds, getDefaultMainWindowBounds, and setMainWindowBounds instead of inventing new IPC.
Preserve the existing layout preset behavior for panel splits, lock state, and popout bounds.
When restoring the default layout, reset the main window to the default bounds if available.
Keep the implementation conservative and local; do not redesign the menu structure.
success_criteria: Saving a layout preset captures the current main window bounds alongside the existing layout data.
Loading a saved layout preset restores the main window bounds before or together with the layout application.
Resetting to the default layout also restores default main window bounds when available.
